toolbox_labels.文件操作（与SD文件块共用）: File operations (shared with SD file blocks)

seeed_fs_sd_begin.tooltip: Initialize Seeed SD card file system using default SPI pins

seeed_fs_sd_begin_spi.message0: Initialize SD card CS pin: %1 Frequency: %2 MHz
seeed_fs_sd_begin_spi.tooltip: Initialize SD card using specified CS pin and frequency

seeed_fs_file_exists.tooltip: Check whether the file or directory at the specified path exists

seeed_fs_open_file.tooltip: Open the file and return the file object

seeed_fs_read_file.tooltip: Read the entire contents of an open file

seeed_fs_file_available.tooltip: Check if the file has readable data

seeed_fs_file_size.tooltip: Get the size of the opened file (bytes)

seeed_fs_write_quick.tooltip: Fast writing to files (automatic opening and closing, overwrite writing)

seeed_fs_read_quick.tooltip: Quickly read the entire contents of a file (automatic opening and closing)

seeed_fs_append_file.message0: Append to write file path: %1 content: %2
seeed_fs_append_file.tooltip: Append content to end of file (open and close automatically)

seeed_fs_delete_file.tooltip: Delete the file at the specified path

seeed_fs_rename_file.message0: Rename the file Old path: %1 New path: %2

seeed_fs_remove_dir.tooltip: Delete the directory at the specified path

seeed_fs_list_dir.tooltip: List directory contents through Serial, LEVELS specifies the number of recursion levels (0=current level only)

seeed_sfud_fs_begin_qspi.message0: Initializing the SFUD Flash File System (QSPI)
seeed_sfud_fs_begin_qspi.tooltip: Use QSPI interface to initialize Wio Terminal built-in W25Q32 flash file system, default frequency 104MHz

seeed_sfud_fs_begin_spi.message0: Initialize SFUD Flash File System (SPI) CS pin: %1 Frequency: %2 MHz
seeed_sfud_fs_begin_spi.tooltip: Initialize SFUD external flash file system using SPI interface

seeed_sfud_fs_flash_info.tooltip: Get SFUD flash memory capacity information

seeed_sfud_fs_file_exists.tooltip: Checks whether the file or directory at the specified path exists in the SFUD flash file system

seeed_sfud_fs_open_file.message0: SFUD flash open file %1 Path: %2 Mode: %3
seeed_sfud_fs_open_file.tooltip: Open a file in an SFUD flash file system, returning a file object (can be used with closing/read-writing file blocks)

seeed_sfud_fs_write_quick.message0: SFUD flash memory fast writing Path: %1 Content: %2
seeed_sfud_fs_write_quick.tooltip: Fast writing to SFUD flash files (automatic opening and closing, overwrite writing)

seeed_sfud_fs_read_quick.message0: SFUD flash memory fast reading path:%1
seeed_sfud_fs_read_quick.tooltip: Quickly read the entire contents of SFUD flash files (automatic opening and closing)

seeed_sfud_fs_append_file.message0: SFUD flash memory append writing Path: %1 Content: %2
seeed_sfud_fs_append_file.tooltip: Append content to end of SFUD flash file (open and close automatically)

seeed_sfud_fs_delete_file.tooltip: Delete the file at the specified path in the SFUD flash file system

seeed_sfud_fs_rename_file.message0: SFUD flash memory rename old path: %1 new path: %2
seeed_sfud_fs_rename_file.tooltip: Rename or move files in SFUD flash file system

seeed_sfud_fs_create_dir.message0: SFUD flash memory creation directory path:%1
seeed_sfud_fs_create_dir.tooltip: Create directory in SFUD flash file system

seeed_sfud_fs_remove_dir.tooltip: Delete directory in SFUD flash file system

seeed_sfud_fs_list_dir.message0: SFUD flash memory list directory path: %1 layer number: %2
seeed_sfud_fs_list_dir.tooltip: List SFUD flash file system directory contents via Serial

seeed_sfud_init.message0: Initialize SFUD raw flash (QSPI fast read)
seeed_sfud_init.tooltip: Initialize SFUD and enable QSPI fast reading for low-level read and write operations of Wio Terminal's built-in W25Q32 flash memory

seeed_sfud_erase.message0: SFUD Erase Flash Address: %1 Size: %2 Bytes
seeed_sfud_erase.tooltip: Erase the flash memory area of the specified size starting at the specified address (address and size are recommended to be aligned by sector 4096 bytes)

seeed_sfud_write_str.tooltip: Write a string to the flash memory at the specified address (erase first and then write, including the terminator)

seeed_sfud_read_str.tooltip: Read a string of specified length from the specified address
